requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 Transport Testing for Lithium Battery Shipments to Bahrain
requirement_topic.zh: 向巴林运输锂电池的UN 38.3运输测试
requirement_topic.zht: 向巴林運輸鋰電池的UN 38.3運輸測試

summary.en: Lithium batteries and cells shipped to Bahrain by air or sea must comply with UN 38.3 (United Nations Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) transport testing requirements applicable to lithium batteries. Bahrain's ports and customs authorities apply IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations for air freight and IMDG Code for sea freight. UN 38.3 test summaries, dangerous goods declarations, and shipping documentation consistent with the applicable transport regulations must accompany lithium battery shipments regardless of BESS system size or configuration.
summary.zh: 通过空运或海运向巴林运输的锂电池和电芯，必须符合适用于锂电池的UN 38.3（联合国试验和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）运输测试要求。巴林港口和海关部门对空运适用IATA危险货物规则，对海运适用IMDG规则。无论BESS系统规模或配置如何，锂电池货物必须附有符合适用运输法规的UN 38.3测试摘要、危险品申报文件和运输单证。
summary.zht: 通過空運或海運向巴林運輸的鋰電池和電芯，必須符合適用於鋰電池的UN 38.3（聯合國試驗和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）運輸測試要求。巴林港口和海關部門對空運適用IATA危險貨物規則，對海運適用IMDG規則。無論BESS系統規模或配置如何，鋰電池貨物必須附有符合適用運輸法規的UN 38.3測試摘要、危險品申報文件和運輸單證。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 (United Nations Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — Lithium metal and lithium ion batteries)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (current edition) — applicable to air freight
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code, current edition) — applicable to sea freight

summary.en: China lithium battery exports for transport purposes are subject to UN 38.3 testing requirements consistent with IATA and IMDG. Chinese exporters typically obtain UN 38.3 test summaries from accredited laboratories. These documents are internationally recognised and are the correct basis for transport compliance to Bahrain.
summary.zh: 中国锂电池出口运输须符合与IATA和IMDG一致的UN 38.3测试要求。中国出口商通常从认可实验室取得UN 38.3测试摘要。这些文件具有国际认可性，是运输合规至巴林的正确依据。
summary.zht: 中國鋰電池出口運輸須符合與IATA和IMDG一致的UN 38.3測試要求。中國出口商通常從認可實驗室取得UN 38.3測試摘要。這些文件具有國際認可性，是運輸合規至巴林的正確依據。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 (applies to both China export and Bahrain import transport)

gap.en: UN 38.3 transport testing is internationally consistent. The primary gap is ensuring up-to-date UN 38.3 test summaries are available for each cell and battery model being shipped, and that dangerous-goods declarations and packaging are correctly prepared for the specific transport mode (air or sea) and route to Bahrain. Confirm with the freight forwarder that all documentation complies with the current IATA or IMDG edition.
gap.zh: UN 38.3运输测试在国际上是一致的。主要差距在于确保为每个出运的电芯和电池型号备有最新的UN 38.3测试摘要，并针对至巴林的特定运输方式（空运或海运）和路线正确准备危险品申报文件和包装。与货运代理确认所有文件符合当前版本的IATA或IMDG规定。
gap.zht: UN 38.3運輸測試在國際上是一致的。主要差距在於確保為每個出運的電芯和電池型號備有最新的UN 38.3測試摘要，並針對至巴林的特定運輸方式（空運或海運）和路線正確準備危險品申報文件和包裝。與貨運代理確認所有文件符合當前版本的IATA或IMDG規定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery shipments to Bahrain by air (IATA DGR) and sea (IMDG Code)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China lithium battery exports under applicable transport dangerous goods regulations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 transport testing is mandatory for all lithium battery BESS shipments to Bahrain regardless of system size. Ensure test summaries are current, packaging is compliant, and dangerous-goods declarations are correctly prepared for the mode of transport.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无论系统规模，向巴林运输的所有锂电池BESS货物强制要求UN 38.3运输测试。确保测试摘要为最新版本，包装合规，并针对运输方式正确准备危险品申报文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無論系統規模，向巴林運輸的所有鋰電池BESS貨物強制要求UN 38.3運輸測試。確保測試摘要為最新版本，包裝合規，並針對運輸方式正確準備危險品申報文件。
